---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused capability, detection, or documentation improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Security Check

Do not include private vulnerability details or exploit instructions in a public feature request. Use GitHub Security Advisories for security-sensitive reports.

## Use Case

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior and expected output.

## Affected Area

- [ ] eBPF collection
- [ ] Shared event schema
- [ ] Userspace normalization
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Built-in detection
- [ ] Rule engine
- [ ] Output format
- [ ] Packaging or install flow
- [ ] Documentation

## Required Telemetry Or Fields

List any event fields required for this feature.

## Safety And Performance Considerations

Describe verifier, kernel, runtime, overhead, or privacy concerns.

## False Positives Or Limits

If this is detection-related, describe likely false positives and what should remain out of scope.

## Validation Ideas

Describe tests, demo commands, or benchmark checks that could validate the feature.

## Additional Context

Add references, examples, or related issues.
